metadata.description: Upcoming NOFOs and NOIs — prepare now opportunities

grants.title: DOE Battery Materials Processing NOFO
grants.description: Department of Energy Manufacturing and Energy Supply Chains office funding for battery materials processing and critical mineral supply chain development. NOI released August 2025, full NOFO expected Q2 2026. Relevant for AI-driven mineral exploration and processing optimization.
grants.eligibility_text: Open to US entities. Small businesses, universities, national labs, and consortia eligible.
preparation_steps: Draft concept paper focused on AI for mineral exploration
Identify DOE national lab partners (e.g., Lawrence Berkeley)
Align with DOE critical minerals priority list

grants.title: ARPA-E Critical Minerals Discovery Program
grants.description: ARPA-E program for transformative approaches to critical minerals discovery and extraction. Expected to fund novel AI/ML approaches to geological exploration.
grants.eligibility_text: Open to US entities. High-risk high-reward research.

grants.title: [UPCOMING] Funding Opportunity eXCHANGE.
grants.description: Sign up to receive the latest information about CMEI’s energy innovation funding, prize, and competition opportunities.

grants.title: [UPCOMING] Requests for Information
grants.description: Below are the current open CMEI requests for information (RFI). Visit theFunding Opportunity Exchangeto see past RFIs.
